# Pull Request Template

## Summary
- What changed:
- Why:

## Source References
- Primary source dump/file:
- Additional source dump/file (if any):
- `@see` references added/updated:

## Scope
- Main paths touched:
- Communication layer touched (`yes/no`):

## Validation
- [ ] `dotnet build Vortex.sln -c Debug`
- [ ] `dotnet test Vortex.sln` (or reason if not applicable)
- [ ] Smoke run on `scenes/Vortex.tscn`

## Checklists
- [ ] `docs/DEFINITION_OF_DONE.md` satisfied
- [ ] `docs/STYLEGUIDE.md` followed
- [ ] `docs/COMMUNICATION_CHECKLIST.md` followed (if applicable)

## Source Conflict Note (Only if needed)
- Primary source file:
- Secondary source file:
- Conflict summary:
- Decision taken:

## UI Evidence (If applicable)
- Screenshots / recordings:
